table.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 2px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the item can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Questionnaire for the Source stage of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. Records the documentation sources from which a cancer case has been notified to the registry. Each source represents a piece of documentation (such as a hospital record, pathology report, or death certificate) linked to a specific tumor via the Tumor Number. Contains a visible Source section and a hidden TUMOURIDSOURCETABLE section used for CanReg5 data extraction.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%
div.p: Profiles: CRMI Shareable ValueSet, CRMI Publishable ValueSet, CRMI Computable ValueSet

ul.li: Include all codes defined in https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/CRTumorNumberCS version 📦0.1.0

div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%
div.p: Profiles: CRMI Shareable ValueSet, CRMI Publishable ValueSet, CRMI Computable ValueSet

ul.li: Include all codes defined in https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/CRPlaceholderSourceTypeCS version 📦0.1.0

description.value: Value set of tumor number identifiers. Combined with the Patient ID, the Tumor Number forms the Tumor ID composite identifier that uniquely identifies a tumor record within the system.

title.value: CR - Placeholder: Source type value set

description.value: Value set of placeholder source type codes for the Source stage. These values must be customised prior to implementation to reflect local source types (e.g. hospital records, pathology reports, death certificates).

Questionnaire for the Source stage of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. Records the documentation sources from which a cancer case has been notified to the registry. Each source represents a piece of documentation (such as a hospital record, pathology report, or death certificate) linked to a specific tumor via the Tumor Number. Contains a visible Source section and a hidden TUMOURIDSOURCETABLE section used for CanReg5 data extraction.
